creator: harrison.grundy@astrodoggroup.com
text:
Ah ha! What happens if I change addresses again?

It seems weird to switch harrison.grundy-astrodoggroup.com to harrison-astrodog.net (or whatever). I think you're right on the committer matching fun, I think Bugzilla has some stuff like that too. My only concern is losing track of some older bugs and reviews I prodded at before.

Any suggestions?

--- Harrison
